anchor: If the water reaches 100 degrees Celsius at sea level, then it boils.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If the water reaches 100 degrees Celsius at sea level, then it boils.
(or / or
    :op1 (r / reach-01
            :polarity -
            :ARG0 w
            :ARG1 (t / temperature-quantity
                     :quant 100
                     :scale (c / celsius))
            :location (l / level
                         :mod (s / sea)))
    :op2 (b / boil-01
            :ARG1 (w / water)))
positive: The water does not reach 100 degrees Celsius at sea level, or it boils.

anchor: If a patient takes the medication and follows the doctor's instructions, then they recover within two weeks.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If a patient takes the medication and follows the doctor's instructions, then they recover within two weeks.
(a2 / and
    :op1 (t2 / take-01
             :ARG0 p
             :ARG1 (m / medication))
    :op2 (f / follow-02
            :ARG0 p
            :ARG1 (ii / instruct-01
                      :ARG0 (d / doctor)
                      :ARG1 p))
    :condition (r / recover-01
                  :polarity -
                  :ARG1 (p / patient)
                  :time (a / after
                           :quant (u / up-to
                                     :op1 (t / temporal-quantity
                                             :quant 2
                                             :unit (w / week)))))
    :polarity -)
positive: If a patient does not recover within two weeks, then they did not take the medication or did not follow the doctor's instructions.

anchor: Neither the manager nor the assistant attended the meeting.
amr_positive:
# ::snt Neither the manager nor the assistant attended the meeting.
(a / attend-01
   :ARG0 (a2 / or
             :op1 (p / person
                     :ARG0-of (m / manage-01)
                     :polarity -)
             :op2 (p2 / person
                      :ARG0-of (a3 / assist-01)
                      :polarity -))
   :ARG1 (m2 / meet-03))
positive: It is not the case that the manager attended the meeting or the assistant attended the meeting.

anchor: If a country produces more goods than it consumes, it exports the surplus to trading partners.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If a country produces more goods than it consumes, it exports the surplus to trading partners.
(or / or
    :op1 (p2 / produce-01
             :polarity -
             :ARG0 (c3 / country)
             :ARG1 (g / good
                      :ARG1-of (h / have-quant-91
                                  :ARG3 (m / more)
                                  :ARG4 (g2 / good
                                            :ARG1-of (c4 / consume-01
                                                         :ARG0 c3)))))
    :op2 (e / export-01
            :ARG0 (c / country)
            :ARG1 (s / surplus)
            :ARG2 (c2 / country
                      :ARG0-of (p / partner-01
                                  :ARG1 c
                                  :mod (t / trade-01)))))
positive: A country does not produce more goods than it consumes, or it exports the surplus to trading partners.

anchor: If every passenger boards by 8 AM and the crew is ready, then the flight departs at 8:15 AM.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If every passenger boards by 8 AM and the crew is ready, then the flight departs at 8:15 AM.
(a / and
   :op1 (b / board-01
           :ARG0 (p / passenger
                    :mod (e / every))
           :time (b2 / by
                     :op1 (d3 / date-entity
                              :time "8:00")))
   :op2 (r / ready-02
           :ARG1 (c / crew))
   :condition (d / depart-01
                 :polarity -
                 :ARG0 (f / fly-01)
                 :time (d2 / date-entity
                           :time "8:15"))
   :polarity -)
positive: If the flight does not depart on time, then some passenger does not board by 8 AM or the crew is not ready.

anchor: Alice must finish her homework before dinner.
amr_positive:
# ::snt Alice must finish her homework before dinner.
(o / possible-01
   :ARG2 (f / finish-01
            :ARG0 (p / person
                     :name (n / name
                              :op1 "Alice"))
            :ARG1 (h / homework
                     :poss p)
            :time (b / before
                     :op1 (d / dinner))
            :polarity -)
   :polarity -)
positive: It is not possible that Alice does not finish her homework before dinner.

anchor: Visitors may use the WiFi after registering at the front desk.
amr_positive:
# ::snt Visitors may use the WiFi after registering at the front desk.
(p / prohibit-01
   :ARG1 (u / use-01
            :ARG0 (p2 / person
                      :ARG0-of (v / visit-01))
            :ARG1 (w / WiFi)
            :time (a / after
                     :op1 (r / register-02
                             :ARG0 p2
                             :ARG2 (d / desk
                                      :mod (f / front))))
            :polarity -)
   :polarity -)
positive: It is not necessary that visitors not use the WiFi after registering at the front desk.
